dimensions.label: Host Routing
dimensions.description: Keep haswell and cinnamon distinct across the whole scenario.

dimensions.label: Selective Recovery
dimensions.description: Recover only the disconnected host workspace instead of recreating everything.

dimensions.label: Workspace Reuse
dimensions.description: Preserve the healthy host workspace across the disconnect and recovery turns.

dimensions.label: Recovery Honesty
dimensions.description: Stay explicit about which host disconnected, what had to be recreated, and what remained proven.

dimensions.label: Result Clarity
dimensions.description: Summarize final host-to-pane mapping and recovery actions clearly enough for an operator to trust.
